title: Cellforge
description: A multi-sheet spreadsheet with a from-scratch formula engine — hand-written lexer, Pratt parser, evaluator, and one live dependency graph with topological recalc + cycle detection. NEW v6 — the SOLVER grows up: MIXED-INTEGER PROGRAMMING via LP-based BRANCH & BOUND (mark cells int/bin for whole-number or 0/1 decisions — a real 0/1 knapsack solves exactly, not by rounding), plus a full post-optimal SENSITIVITY REPORT — SHADOW PRICES (duals read straight off the optimal simplex tableau), reduced costs, and RHS / objective-coefficient ranging. On top of v5's OPTIMIZATION engine: a multi-cell Solver whose from-scratch two-phase primal SIMPLEX solves linear models EXACTLY (auto-detected by probing) — ≤/≥/= constraints, variable bounds, infeasible/unbounded detection — while a derivative-free Nelder–Mead + penalty + multi-start search handles nonlinear ones, all over real recalculations. Plus STRUCTURED TABLE references (Sales[Amount], [#All], [#Headers], [@Column]) and GROUPBY/PIVOTBY field_headers, grand totals and filter_array. On top of v4's spill-range refs (A1#), one-formula pivots, recursive lambdas, XMATCH; v3's dynamic arrays (#SPILL!, broadcasting), LAMBDA/LET + MAP/REDUCE/SCAN and Goal Seek; cross-sheet refs, named ranges, undo/redo, Excel dates, ~195 functions, draggable SVG charts and find & replace. 242 in-app engine self-tests.
